validated_by: repo owner (hand-confirmed segmentation + order 2026-07-03; B8-placement + caption/figure grouping corrected against the photo 2026-07-03)

grading.why: Stage 02 gutter-splits the spread into left.png (p.86) + right.png (p.87); Stage 04 computes reading_order 0..n-1 independently per subpage. There is NO single spread-level ordering to grade against.
grading.anchor_match: Match each GT anchor to a detected block by text overlap ANYWHERE in the block, not by exact prefix. OCR will garble the first words on this rotated, colored-background page.
grading.primary_invariants: Per the owner, the load-bearing assertions are (1) correct segmentation into these blocks, (2) correct type per block, (3) each caption attached to its figure (B8->B5, B7->B6). Exact linear reading order is SECONDARY — the owner considers precise sequence low-priority as long as captions stay grouped with figures. Weight the metric accordingly.

grading.metric_todo: The harness is WER-only today. A sequence-order metric (block-order match / Kendall-tau over matched blocks, plus a caption<->figure grouping check) still has to be written; this fixture UNBLOCKS that proof but does not by itself constitute it.

document_order_gate4.note: The owner-validated whole-document linear order for Gate-4 reflow (each figure floated with its caption as a unit, then the continuous prose). B5+B8 = Fig. 20 with its caption (both on the left subpage); B6+B7 = Fig. 21 panorama (B6=B6L+B6R stitched) with its caption. This is the reflow target, NOT the Stage-04 per-subpage XY-Cut target above (same data, two different consumers).

notes: CROSS-GUTTER FIGURE: B6 (Fig. 21 panorama) is ONE physical photo split by the spine into B6L (left subpage, LAGAZUOI PICCOLO) + B6R (right subpage, LAGAZUOI GRANDE). This fixture grades reading ORDER + grouping only; cross-page figure stitching is a separate Stage 01/02 capability with its own proof.

NO CROSS-PAGE CAPTION (corrected 2026-07-03): both captions sit on the same subpage as their figure. B8 (Fig. 20 caption) is in the rightmost/gutter column of the LEFT subpage, with its figure B5. B7 (Fig. 21 caption) is in the leftmost/gutter column of the RIGHT subpage, under the right fragment B6R. The two captions flank the spine (the two central columns of the spread).
CAPTION<->FIGURE GROUPING is the owner's key invariant: keep B8 with B5 and B7 with B6, regardless of exact linear position. Precise reading order is explicitly secondary here.

PROSE CONTINUITY: body is one continuous flow B9->B10->B11->B12, verified by text joining across the breaks: '...di scaglie'|'tettoniche...', '...il loro colore tipico'|'è il rosso...', '...L'ossatura di questi'|'rilievi è impostata...'.

HARD FEATURES this page exercises: ~90 degree rotation, tan text background + red fault lines over the photo, two repeated running headers to de-dup/strip, 3-column body per subpage (2 prose columns + 1 gutter-side caption column), figure-internal annotation labels.

GT COVERS block segmentation + type + caption/figure grouping + per-subpage reading order ONLY. NOT verbatim text; there is no WER ground truth for this page (deliberate — WER conflates layout scramble with recognition on figure-sidebar spreads).
